---
title: "Portfolio"
---

## Projects

### PRPR.ONE (Personal Website)

A self-hosted website featuring an original interactive fiction game, built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript (frontend), Node.js/Express (backend), and CloudNativePG. Deployed on a home Kubernetes cluster with CI/CD, auto-scaling, and automated backups.

**[Visit -›](https://prpr.one)**

### The Lost Magic (Interactive Fiction)

![](./images/portfolio/galatea-wide.webp){style="float: right; margin: 10px;" width=20% .lightbox}

A proof-of-concept interactive novel inspired by Emily Short's Galatea. Built with web technologies and the Twine/SugarCube framework, featuring pre-rendered visuals and a branching narrative.

**[Visit -›](https://galatea.prpr.one)**

### 修仙长生路

A Discord RPG bot set in a xianxia cultivation world. Features character creation, realm progression, sect systems, city exploration, gathering, quests, equipment, dual cultivation, and server-wide public events.

Developed collaboratively with [@GenKnot](https://github.com/GenKnot) and [@AdoreJc](https://github.com/AdoreJc). My personal contributions include architecting GitOps workflows, automating Kubernetes deployments, and implementing robust CI/CD pipelines to ensure seamless updates and scalability.

**[Github Repo -›](https://github.com/GenKnot/Mischicat-Bot)**

## Writing Samples

Explore my writing on literature reviews, book and movie critiques, as well as cultural and media studies.

**[Visit -›](posts/writingsamples.qmd)**
